testcase.name: test_oauth

failure.message: TypeError: 'FuturesSession' object does not support item assignment

testcase.failure:
self = <tests.test_auth.AuthTests testMethod=test_oauth>
def test_oauth(self): rv = self.client.get('/api/tokens/oauth2/bar') assert rv.status_code == 404 > rv = self.client.get('/api/tokens/oauth2/foo') ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

run_wsgi_app(self.application, environ, buffered=buffered) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/werkzeug/test.py:1264: in run_wsgi_app app_rv = app(environ, start_response) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask/app.py:1498: in __call__ return self.wsgi_app(environ, start_response) full_dispatch_request rv = self.handle_user_exception(e) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask_cors/extension.py:178: in wrapped_function return cors_after_request(app.make_response(f(*args, **kwargs))) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/flask/app.py:880: in full_dispatch_request rv = self.dispatch_request() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/apifairy/decorators.py:113: in _response rv = f(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/apifairy/decorators.py:36: in wrapper return current_app.ensure_sync(f)(*args, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
provider = 'foo'
@tokens.route('/tokens/oauth2/<provider>', methods=['GET']) @response(EmptySchema, status_code=302, description="Redirect to OAuth2 provider's authentication page") @other_responses({404: 'Unknown OAuth2 provider'}) def oauth2_authorize(provider): """Initiate OAuth2 authentication with a third-party provider""" provider_data = current_app.config['OAUTH2_PROVIDERS'].get(provider) if provider_data is None: abort(404) > session['oauth2_state'] = secrets.token_urlsafe(16) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E TypeError: 'FuturesSession' object does not support item assignment
api/tokens.py:141: TypeError
